params.name: theme
params.description: Header theme. Use `dark` or `light`. Defaults to `dark`.

params.name: layout
params.description: Header width behavior. Use `fixed` or `fluid`. Defaults to `fixed`.

params.name: showBottomBorder
params.description: Whether to render the Header bottom border across the full width of the Header. Defaults to `true`.

params.name: brand
params.description: Brand block configuration.

params.name: href
params.description: Brand destination URL.

params.name: ariaLabel
params.description: Accessible name for the brand link.

params.name: nhsLogo
params.description: Optional NHS partner logo region. Use `england`, `scotland`, `wales`, or `northern-ireland`.

params.name: attributes
params.description: Additional HTML attributes for the brand link.

params.name: utilityLinks
params.description: Top-bar utility links rendered above the main Header row.

params.name: search
params.description: Search configuration using the same shape as the Search input macro.

params.name: action
params.description: Standalone middle-row action link.

params.name: href
params.description: Action destination URL.

params.name: label
params.description: Action link text.

params.name: openInNewWindow
params.description: Open the action in a new window and append `rel` values.

params.name: attributes
params.description: Additional HTML attributes for the action link.

params.name: account
params.description: Account state configuration for either sign-in or signed-out account links.

params.name: navigation
params.description: Primary navigation items. Each item is either a leaf link (`{ href, label }`) or a grouped item (`{ label, items: [...] }`).

params.name: idPrefix
params.description: ID prefix used for the generated mobile and desktop disclosure controls.

params.name: classes
params.description: Classes to add to the root Header element.

params.name: attributes
params.description: Additional HTML attributes for the root Header element.
